title: Hiring Production Engineer at Emami Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Emami Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Emami Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Emami Digital Technologies:
Emami Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
